free_text: High resolution measurements of radiative neutron
capture in Ti-47, Fe-56, Ni-58, Ni-60 and Ni-61
Pulsed 3 MV Van de Graaff accelerator.

recording of flight time and pulse height.

sample admixtures (O in oxides, isotopic impurities,

by sample thickness (atom/b), equal to true cross
section only where effects of sample thickness (self-
shielding, multiple collisions) and resolution are

uncertain, based on visibility of peaks in Duke and
Columbia transmission data. Note that in capture
both p and d wave levels are seen above about 50 keV,
i.e. the l values listed are actually
l=0 likely, Columbia data seem to show
L=0 certain, columbia data show typical asymmetry.
